hero.title: Understand your medical reports in minutes.
hero.sub: Upload a blood report, scan, or prescription. Nutrolis turns the clinical jargon into one clear, plain-language explanation — in your language.
hero.badge: Now in early access — be one of the first to truly understand your reports.

problem.heading:
Your reports weren't written for you.
We fix that.
problem.title: The problem today
problem.subtitle: Reading your own report shouldn't feel like this
problem.item1: Codes, abbreviations and numbers you simply can't decode.
problem.item2: “Normal ranges” differ by lab and country — is your value really okay?
problem.item3: Days of waiting and worry before you can reach a doctor.
problem.item4: Googling your results leads to panic, not answers.
problem.item5: It's all dense medical English — not your language.
problem.item6: You arrive at the appointment unsure what to even ask.

solution.title: The Nutrolis way
solution.subtitle: Your report, made human
solution.item1: Upload any report — we read every term and marker for you.
solution.item2: One calm, plain-language explanation, in your language (20+).
solution.item3: Instantly see what's healthy, what's worth a look, and what to do.
solution.item4: Track everything over time with a single PLOS health score.
solution.item5: Walk in with the exact questions to ask your doctor.

how.heading: From upload to understanding in three steps.
how.s1_body: Drag in a PDF, photo, or scan of your blood report, X-ray summary, or prescription. We handle the rest.
how.s2_body: Nutrolis reads every term and marker, then rewrites it the way a kind doctor friend would explain it to you.
how.s3_body: See what's good, what's worth a look, and the exact questions to bring to your next appointment.

demo.heading: See a confusing report become a clear sentence.
demo.start_body: Press translate and watch Nutrolis read this report, understand the terms, and explain it gently.
demo.terms_heading: Every lab term, explained in simple words.
demo.terms_sub: Your value, where it sits on the scale, what it means in plain words, and a clear status.
demo.mk_hb_desc: The part of your blood that carries oxygen everywhere. Yours is a touch low, which can sometimes leave you feeling more tired than usual.
demo.mk_ldl_desc: Often called the "lousy" cholesterol. A little extra can slowly build up in your arteries — small diet and movement changes usually nudge it back down.
demo.mk_vitd_desc: The "sunshine vitamin" that keeps your bones and mood strong. Yours is low — very common, especially in winter — and easy to top back up.
demo.mk_tsh_desc: A signal from your brain telling your thyroid how hard to work. Yours sits comfortably in the healthy middle — nothing to do here.
demo.mk_hba1c_desc: Your average blood sugar over the last three months. Yours sits just at the edge — a few easy habit tweaks usually keep it from creeping up.
demo.mk_creat_desc: A waste product your kidneys clear from your blood. Yours sits right in the healthy middle — a good sign your kidneys are doing their job.

features.heading: Your Platform for All Your Reports
features.f1_b: Every CBC, lipid panel, and metabolic marker, explained line by line.
features.f2_b: Radiology reports turned into plain words you can actually picture.
features.f3_b: What each medicine does, how to take it, and what to watch for.
features.f4_b: Tap any medical term for a simple, plain-language definition.
features.f5_b: Gentle trends over time so you can see the bigger picture.
features.f6_b: Read your results in your language — including right-to-left scripts.

plos.explainer: PLOS — your Preventive Lifestyle Operating System — turns a page full of lab values into a single score from 0 to 100. The closer everything sits inside its healthy range, the higher it climbs. One figure you can actually track.
plos.modal_para: A lab report can carry dozens of numbers. PLOS — your Preventive Lifestyle Operating System — gathers them into one simple score from 0 to 100, so you always know where your health stands today.
plos.f1_b: Every value is checked against its healthy range, then rolled into a single, easy score.
plos.f2_b: Watch one figure climb or dip across reports — no more guessing from scattered results.
plos.f3_b: A gentle slide in your score can show up long before anything becomes a worry.
plos.f4_b: Explained simply, in your language, with calm next steps — never clinical jargon.
plos.means_note: A friendly guide to your health, not a diagnosis — your doctor is always the best guide for your care.

langs.heading: A 10-year-old or a 70-year-old can read it.
langs.sub: The same report, explained in plain words — in major Indian languages, English, and European ones. Tap a language, or just watch.

faq.heading: Questions, answered.
faq.q1: Is this a replacement for my doctor?
faq.a1: No — and we never pretend to be. Nutrolis helps you understand what your report says and prepare better questions, so your time with your doctor goes further. Always follow your clinician’s advice.
faq.q2: How private is my health data?
faq.a2: Deeply. Your documents are read in your browser and never uploaded or stored — only the extracted findings are saved, encrypted, and never sold. You can delete everything in one tap.
faq.a3: Over 20 today, including right-to-left scripts like Arabic and Urdu. The full explanation — every term, status, and suggestion — is translated, not just the headings.
faq.q4: What kinds of reports can I upload?
faq.a4: Blood panels, metabolic and lipid profiles, radiology and scan summaries, and prescriptions. PDFs and clear photos both work.
faq.q5: Will it scare me with red warnings?
faq.a5: Never. Anything outside the usual range is shown in a calm amber as “worth a look,” not an emergency. Red is reserved only for actions you choose, like deleting your data.

cta.heading: Understand your next report in minutes.
cta.sub: Upload one report free. See your results turned into one calm, clear explanation in under two minutes.
cta.reassure: No card required · Private & encrypted · Cancel anytime

footer.tagline: Medical reports, turned into a calm, plain-language explanation anyone can understand — in their own language.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Nutrolis AI. Made to lower your heart rate.
footer.disclaimer: Nutrolis helps you understand your reports. It is not a medical device and does not replace your doctor.
